data.title: 国际服关于CC机制的提示
data.summary: [Crowd Control (CC) Notice] They say that a good CC is crucial for clearing the new Total Assault -
data.body:
[Crowd Control (CC) Notice]

They say that a good CC is crucial for clearing the new Total Assault - Hod (Urban Warfare) set to be opened on 9/13 (Tue).

Find out which of your students have CC and other related buffs before the battle!

#BlueArchive![9MUM3Rt0fhw5IPxjnVfS2WM4E9NRRhHy.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/9MUM3Rt0fhw5IPxjnVfS2WM4E9NRRhHy.jpg)
